title: Hermes Platform — Profile Policy
description: Schema for policies/<profile>.policy.yaml files. Validated at gateway startup and on POST /admin/reload-policies.

profile.description: Lowercase profile name; must match the registry entry and the policy filename (<profile>.policy.yaml).

description.description: Free-form documentation. Not used by the policy engine.

items.description: Glob pattern. * matches one segment; ** matches zero or more segments; ? matches one char.
